top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.UserId IS NOT NULL THEN u.Id END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(u.Id) AS percentage_with_teacher_badge
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId AND b.Name = 'Teacher';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT b.UserId) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT u.Id) AS percentage_users_with_teacher_badge
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId AND b.Name = 'Teacher';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.UserId IS NOT NULL THEN u.Id END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(u.Id) AS percentage_with_teacher_badge
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId AND b.Name = 'Teacher';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT b.UserId) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT u.Id) AS percentage_users_with_teacher_badge
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId AND b.Name = 'Teacher';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT b.UserId) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(u.Id) AS percentage_with_teacher_badge
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId AND b.Name = 'Teacher';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.UserId IS NOT NULL THEN u.Id END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(u.Id) AS percentage_with_teacher_badge
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId AND b.Name = 'Teacher';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.Name = 'Teacher' THEN u.Id END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_users_with_teacher_badge
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT b.UserId) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT u.Id) AS percentage_users_with_teacher_badge
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId AND b.Name = 'Teacher';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.UserId IS NOT NULL THEN u.Id END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(u.Id) AS percentage_with_teacher_badge
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId AND b.Name = 'Teacher';
